decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_nostrand-rogers-sbs' exactly matches an existing canonical registry record. That record already lists source_id '201109_brt_nostrand_cac4' in its source_ids and includes the alias 'project_nostrand-rogers-sbs-cac4-201109'. The observation is already canonically resolved to this identity; no cross-record link is needed. Per the rule: closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id → decision is 'new'.
